intended_use: Second Opinion PC is a computer aided detection ("CADe") software to aid dentists in the detection of periapical radiolucencies by drawing bounding polygons to highlight the suspected region of intere
intended_use_full: Second Opinion PC is a computer aided detection ("CADe") software to aid dentists in the detection of periapical radiolucencies by drawing bounding polygons to highlight the suspected region of interest. It is designed to aid dental health professionals to review periapical radiographs of permanent teeth in patients 12 years of age or older as a second reader.
ground_truth: Consensus approach based on agreement among at least three out of four expert readers, with experts marking smallest possible polygonal contours to encompass identified regions
other_metrics: wAFROC-FOM 95% CI (0.85, 0.81, 0.89); HR-ROC-AUC 95% CI (0.93, 0.90, 0.96); lesion level sensitivity 95% CI (77%, 69%, 84%); average false positives per image 95% CI (0.28, 0.23, 0.33); lesion localizations mean per image 116 (1.2)
